LG AI대학원 학위수여식 현장 지난 2022년 3월 개원한 LG AI대학원 박사 과정은 산업 현장의 복잡한 문제를 새롭게 정의하고, 이를 해결할 독창적인 방법론을 제시하는 ‘연구 리

preview_articles.title: Amazon Nova AI Challenge returns with Nova Forge access for competing teams
preview_articles.summary: For the first time in an academic competition, students can customize frontier AI models to build trusted software agents
preview_articles.author: Staff writer

preview_articles.title: Engaging the AI community through building, research, and shared learning
preview_articles.summary: Advancing AI requires more than breakthrough models. It depends on communities of builders and researchers who experiment, test assumptions, and share what they learn. That belief is guiding how Amazon engages developers and academics around Amazon Nova, Amazon’s portfolio of AI offerings including the Nova models, Nova Forge and Nova Act.
preview_articles.author: Staff writer

preview_articles.title: A decade of NFL Next Gen Stats innovation
preview_articles.summary: Every NFL game generates millions of tracking data points from 22 RFID-equipped players. Seventy-five machine learning models running on AWS process that data in under a second, transforming football into a sport where every movement is measured, modeled, and instantly analyzed.
preview_articles.author: Sean O'Neill

preview_articles.title: UniRG: Scaling medical imaging report generation with multimodal reinforcement learning
preview_articles.summary: AI can help generate medical image reports, but today’s models struggle with varying reporting schemes. Learn how UniRG uses reinforcement learning to boost performance of medical vision-language models.
preview_articles.author: Sheng Zhang, Flora Liu, Guanghui Qin, Mu Wei, Hoifung Poon

preview_articles.title: DeepSeek Engram V4 Architecture
Customizing multiturn AI agents with reinforcement learning
preview_articles.summary: Leveraging existing environment simulators and reward functions based on verifiable ground truth boosts task success rate, even with small models and small training datasets.
preview_articles.author: Shreyas Subramanian

preview_articles.title: TRecViT: A Recurrent Video Transformer
Fine-tuning vision-language models on memory-constrained devices
preview_articles.summary: A new hybrid optimization approach allows edge devices to fine-tune vision-language models using only forward passes, achieving up to 7% higher accuracy than existing techniques.
preview_articles.author: Rupak Vignesh Swaminathan

preview_articles.summary: PAPER DISCORD Introduction Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a pivotal paradigm for scaling language models and enhancing their deep reasoning and problem-solving capabilities. To scale RL, the foremost prerequisite is maintaining stable and robust training dynamics. Notably, Qwen-TTS automatically adjusts prosody, pacing, and emotional inflections in response to the input text.
